case_title: OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP) VS. JUAN CARLOS ORTIZ

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $60.00) SERVED APR-28-2016, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT ORTIZ, JUAN CARLOS
RETURNED MAIL: CONTINUE ORDER MAILED TO DEFENDANT RETURNED = RETURN TO SENDER, NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSES, UNABLE TO FORWARD

ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-08-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-08-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. IS PRESENT. REPRESENTED BY NANCY ANGEL-HERRERA, LEGAL COLLECTION SPECIALIST. NO APPEARANCE BY THE DEFENDANT JUAN CARLOS ORTIZ. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-08-2017 - JUDGMENT.
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: SMALL CLAIMS-CONTINUE ORDER MAILED TO DEFENDANT ON 10/14/16. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "ATTEMPTED-NOT KNOWN-UNABLE TO FORWARD."
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP) AS TO DEFENDANT ORTIZ, JUAN CARLOS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-09-2016 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-09-2016 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO OCT-14-2016 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY DONNA FLORES--LEGAL COLLECTION SPECIALISTS. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-12-2017 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO AUG-08-2017 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. IS PRESENT. REPRESENTED BY SERGIO CAMPOS LEGAL COLLECTIONS SUPERVISOR. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT JUAN CARLOS ORTIZ. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP) RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ORTIZ, JUAN CARLOS $740.00 PRINCIPAL, $110.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $850.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
